name: Dodds Park
description: Dodds Park is a place to play pickleball in Lena, IL. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.

name: Family YMCA Of Northwest Illinois
description: Come play pickleball at Family YMCA Of Northwest Illinois in Freeport, IL! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, locker rooms, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — To play is free for YMCA members $4 for non members

name: Fitness Lifestyles of Freeport Club
description: Fitness Lifestyles of Freeport Club is a place to play pickleball in Freeport, IL. There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to lights.

name: Jr High Freeport
description: Jr High Freeport is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Freeport, IL. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Krape Park
description: Come play pickleball at Krape Park in Freeport, IL! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Lena Community Park District
description: Lena Community Park District is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lena, IL. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.
